deferred.reason: PAC-FR-010 ontology (Patient, Referral, Episode, OASISAssessment, MDSAssessment, PDGMClassification, PDPMClassification, TherapyEncounter, MedicationRecord, HospiceElection, HospiceCertification, LCDPolicy, RehospitalizationRisk) awaits pack-service ontology registration; entity semantics are carried today by the semantic models and dataset schemas.

PAC-FR-100 regulatory guardrails (HIPAA baseline, PDGM 60-day episode / LUPA rules, PDPM interrupted-stay policy, OASIS-E timing/locking, MDS 3.0 schedule, hospice LCD face-to-face, PEPPER/CERT/UPIC defensibility) require guardrail-service / OPA policy materialization, which Core does not expose as a pack surface yet. BR-1's no-autonomous-submission guarantee (PAC_AUTONOMOUS_ASSESSMENT_FORBIDDEN) is covered today by Core invariants: proposal-mode + four-eyes approval for every pack-configured agent.

PAC-FR-030..080 bespoke LangGraph recipes (OASIS Copilot, PDGM Optimizer, MDS Copilot, PDPM Optimizer, Referral Triage, Hospice Eligibility) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead.

PAC-FR-090 read connectors (HomeCare HomeBase, MatrixCare, PointClickCare, Netsmart myUnity, Axxess, WellSky, HL7 ADT via HIE, Bamboo Health, HHAeXchange, CMS iQIES) require customer credentials and pack-service connector materialization. The pack ships seed datasets in the exact landing shape; production connectors are configured through the product Data > Connections UI.

PAC-FR-090 write adapters (OASIS/MDS assessment drafts to EHR, care-plan update, referral response, hospice certification narrative) execute only behind pack-service's materialization contract and customer credentials; all platform-side writes remain proposal-mode per BR-1.

BRD 29 §4's five golden eval sets (OASIS drafting, PDGM comorbidity capture, MDS Section GG, referral triage ranking, hospice LCD narrative) require eval-service write APIs whose action names are not yet in the rbac canonical catalog (Core follow-up noted in rbac catalog.go).

BRD 29 §4 archetypes (rehospitalization_30d_risk, referral_acceptance_score) await experiment-service archetype APIs; the rehospitalization risk model ships as a pipeline seed instead (rehospitalization_risk_model, random_forest).

PAC-FR-110 typed case schemas (oasis_review, mds_review, referral_triage_review, pdgm_optimization_review, pdpm_optimization_review, hospice_eligibility_review) await case-service schema materialization; today's cases carry the same fields via display_projection + the disposition taxonomy.
BRD 29 §4 display-label overlays (case-schema singulars, agent names, patient entity template) require the BFF label-registry endpoints (BFF-FR-082/088) which are pack-service-tier features.
